svg.text: McCzarny recently made several updates across
his projects. He modified the crater-js build
process to copy necessary resources. In
chromium-daily-digest, he increased the Nexos
adapter timeout and added options to limit
daily summaries. He pushed multiple changes to
skia-preview, enhancing its icon parser with
aliases for quadratic bezier commands and
introducing support for multi-color icons.
These updates included modifications to
SkiaIconParser, UI improvements with example
icon buttons, and adding a favicon. He also
updated skia-preview's README to remove
examples, add a GitHub link, and clarify its
work-in-progress status while welcoming
contributions. Separately, an issue was
reported on his OutlookUnreadCounter project
where a user could not select an Outlook
account in the Stream Deck plugin.
Generated on: Sun Mar 22 02:42:43 2026
